data.title: Wall Street Journal: Trump instructs aides to prepare for a prolonged blockade of Iran.
data.description: According to the Wall Street Journal: US President Trump has instructed aides to prepare for a prolonged blockade of Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance to Update Collateral Ratios and Leverage Tiers in May 2026
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, significant updates to collateral ratios and leverage tiers are scheduled for May 1, 2026. These changes will affect various assets under the Portfolio Margin and PM Pro categories. The collateral ratio for assets such as STX, APT, CFX, GRT, MANA, SUSHI, TIA, W, WLD, ZRO, and ASTER will be adjusted from 40% to 30%, with ASTER seeing an increase from 10% to 30%. These adjustments are set to take place at 06:00 (UTC) and are expected to be completed within 30 minutes.

In the PM Pro category, the collateral ratio for INJ will be modified across different rank floors and caps. For instance, the collateral ratio for positions between $800,000 and $1,200,000 will decrease from 100% to 95%, while positions between $1,200,000 and $2,000,000 will see a reduction from 95% to 75%. These changes are designed to optimize the trading environment and risk management for users.

Additionally, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers for several USD-M Perpetual Contracts, including ZENUSDT, EIGENUSDT, 0GUSDT, SUSDT, AUSDT, GALAUSDT, FFUSDT, and EIGENUSDT. The updates will occur at 06:30 (UTC) and are expected to be completed within an hour. Users with existing positions should be aware that these changes may affect their current leverage and margin settings, potentially leading to the expiration of futures running grids. It is advised that users adjust their positions accordingly to avoid any potential liquidation or losses. The collateral ratio changes will also impact the Unified Maintenance Margin Ratio (uniMMR), necessitating close monitoring by users to manage their risk effectively.

data.title: Institutional Capital Faces Barriers to Bitcoin Access, Experts Say
data.description: At Bitcoin 2026, Dylan LeClair highlighted that 99% of institutional capital is currently unable to access Bitcoin or Bitcoin ETFs due to mandates that limit investments to fixed income or specific asset classes. According to NS3.AI, LeClair, along with David Bailey, emphasized that further adoption of Bitcoin hinges on factors such as custody solutions, compliant products, regulatory clarity, and increased participation from corporate balance sheets.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Declines to 37 Amid Market Shifts
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has decreased to 37, marking a two-point drop from the previous day. According to NS3.AI, this index evaluates the 90-day performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies, excluding stablecoins and wrapped tokens, in comparison to Bitcoin. This decline indicates a shift in market dynamics, with altcoins underperforming relative to Bitcoin over the specified period.

data.title: Following the death of the co-founder of ASOS, approximately $4 million worth of Bitcoin was transferred from his wallet.
data.description: Following the death of ASOS co-founder Quentin Griffiths in a fall in Thailand, approximately $4 million in assets were transferred from his Bitcoin wallet. The funds were transferred from his online account to unknown locations in three separate transactions within days of his death. His eldest son, Joel, filed a police report six weeks after his father's passing. Thai police are currently investigating the theft. Quentin Griffiths was previously under investigation for suspected fraud and faced multiple legal proceedings and family property disputes before and after his fall.

data.title: Blockchain's Growing Influence in Finance
data.description: Blockchain technology, while its future as the next-generation internet infrastructure remains uncertain, is undeniably becoming a significant force in the financial sector. According to PANews, its presence is increasingly visible and expanding, akin to an elephant in the room.

data.title: U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis Addresses Concerns Over CLARITY Act Developer Protections
data.description: U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis has responded to journalists' concerns regarding the developer protection clauses in the CLARITY Act. According to Foresight News, Lummis stated that the issue is not a new challenge and efforts are underway to refine the provisions. The aim is to ensure the safety of developers not involved in fund transfers while holding wrongdoers accountable.

data.title: XRP Spot ETF Records Significant Inflows
data.description: According to Odaily, data from SoSoValue indicates that on April 28, Eastern Time, the XRP spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $2.2018 million. The Canary XRP ETF (XRPC) was the sole contributor to this inflow, bringing its historical total net inflow to $424 million. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of the XRP spot ETF stands at $1.053 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.23%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $1.293 billion.

data.title: YieldCore-3rd-deal Suffers $398,000 Loss Due to Security Breach
data.description: YieldCore-3rd-deal, a vault under Trading Protocol, has been attacked, resulting in a loss of approximately $398,000. According to ChainCatcher, the breach was caused by a vulnerability in the contract's caller permission verification, which allowed the attacker to bypass the authorization mechanism and withdraw all funds from the vault. The relevant on-chain transaction records have been disclosed.

data.title: Coinbase has included Citrea (CTR) in its listing roadmap.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Coinbase has included Citrea (CTR) in its listing roadmap.

data.title: BitMine Increases Ethereum Staking with Significant Addition
data.description: BitMine has recently staked 107,992 ETH, valued at $248 million, according to Foresight News. This latest transaction brings BitMine's total staked Ethereum to 3,923,389 ETH, worth approximately $8.98 billion.

data.title: Pershing Square Fund Raises $5 Billion in IPO
data.description: Pershing Square Fund, led by Bill Ackman, announced on Tuesday that its newly established closed-end fund has raised $5 billion as part of its initial public offering (IPO) in the United States. According to Jin10, this IPO marks the realization of Ackman's long-held ambition to list a flagship fund in New York. The new fund is Pershing Square's first offering to U.S. institutional and retail investors without charging performance fees. Ackman previously attempted to bring the new fund, Pershing Square America (PSUS), to the public market in 2024, but withdrew the IPO application days before listing in New York due to lower-than-expected demand. Pershing Square America and Pershing Square will begin trading on the New York Stock Exchange on Wednesday under the ticker symbols "PSUS" and "PS."

data.title: US Treasury Secretary: Iran's cryptocurrency usage channels have been targeted.
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent stated on the X platform that the Treasury Department has taken action through economic sanctions against Iran's international shadow banking infrastructure, cryptocurrency access channels, shadow fleet, weapons procurement networks, regional terrorist proxy financing, and independent Chinese refineries supporting Iranian oil trade. These actions have disrupted billions of dollars in revenue that could have been used to finance terrorism. Under the U.S. President's maximum pressure campaign, Tehran's inflation rate has doubled, and its currency has rapidly depreciated. Harq Island, Iran's main oil export terminal, is nearing its storage capacity, which will force the regime to cut oil production, resulting in an additional loss of approximately $170 million in revenue per day and causing permanent damage to Iran's oil infrastructure. The Treasury Department will continue to exert maximum pressure, and any individual, vessel, or entity assisting in illicit flows through Tehran faces the risk of U.S. sanctions.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $2.2018 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $2.2018 million yesterday (April 28th, Eastern Time). Only the Canary XRP ETF (XRPC) saw net inflows yesterday, with a single-day net inflow of $2.2018 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $424 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF's total net asset value is $1.053 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.23%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.293 billion.

data.title: The Canadian federal government plans to ban cryptocurrency ATMs in an effort to combat fraud.
data.description: The Canadian federal government announced plans to ban cryptocurrency ATMs in its spring economic update released Tuesday to protect Canadians from fraud. The government defines cryptocurrency ATMs as a primary means for fraudsters to defraud victims and for criminals to transfer illicit funds. Previous analysis by FINTRAC showed that cryptocurrency ATMs have become a major channel for fraudsters to access victims' funds in Canada. Because these devices do not require bank accounts and lack human verification, fund transfers are rapid and difficult to trace. Currently, Canada has nearly 4,000 cryptocurrency ATMs, the highest per capita ownership in the world. The Canadian government stated that this measure aims to better protect Canadians from illicit activities while they purchase virtual currencies through physical money services. Previously, countries such as the UK, New Zealand, and Australia have implemented restrictions or bans on cryptocurrency ATMs.

data.title: Robinhood's first-quarter revenue was $1.07 billion, with cryptocurrency trading revenue declining 47% year-over-year.
data.description: Robinhood announced its Q1 2026 financial results, showing quarterly revenue of $107 million, a 15% year-over-year increase. Net income rose 3% to $346 million. Total assets on the platform reached $307 billion, a 39% year-over-year increase. Cryptocurrency revenue was $134 million, a 47% year-over-year decrease. Cryptocurrency notional trading volume was $24 billion, a 48% year-over-year decrease. Options revenue grew 8% to $260 million, and equity revenue grew 46% to $82 million. Robinhood Gold subscription revenue grew 32% to $50 million. Additionally, the company repurchased $250 million worth of stock during the quarter.

data.title: Canada Plans Ban on Cryptocurrency ATMs to Combat Fraud
data.description:
The Canadian federal government announced plans to ban cryptocurrency ATMs in its spring economic update report released on Tuesday. According to Odaily, the government aims to protect citizens from scams by defining these ATMs as a primary method for fraudsters to deceive victims and for criminals to transfer illicit funds.

FINTRAC's previous analysis indicated that cryptocurrency ATMs have become a major channel for scammers to access victims' funds within Canada. These devices do not require a bank account and lack manual verification, resulting in rapid and difficult-to-trace fund transfers. Canada currently has nearly 4,000 cryptocurrency ATMs, the highest per capita in the world. The government stated that the measure is intended to ensure citizens can purchase virtual currency through physical monetary service businesses while better preventing illegal activities. Previously, countries like the United Kingdom, New Zealand, and Australia have implemented restrictions or bans on cryptocurrency ATMs.

data.title: LayerZero Labs Commits 10,000 ETH to Boost DeFi United Liquidity
data.description: LayerZero Labs has pledged over 10,000 ETH to support DeFi United, according to NS3.AI. The company announced it will donate 5,000 ETH and deposit an additional 5,000 ETH into the Aave market. This initiative aims to enhance liquidity and deepen GHO liquidity.

data.title: LayerZero Labs has pledged over 10,000 ETH to DeFi United.
data.description: LayerZero Labs announced on the X platform that it has pledged over 10,000 ETH to support DeFi United, led by Aave. This includes donating 5,000 ETH to DeFi United, depositing 5,000 ETH into the Aave market to enhance liquidity, and deepening GHO liquidity.

data.title: Pumpfun: Has burned approximately $370 million worth of PUMP and has committed to using 50% of its revenue for buybacks and burns over the next year.
data.description: Pumpfun founder Alon announced on the X platform that over the past nine months, PUMP has dedicated 100% of its revenue to buybacks. Approximately $370 million worth of PUMP, representing 36% of the circulating supply, has been burned today. Furthermore, PUMP has committed to allocating 50% of its revenue for programmatic buybacks and burns over the next year, with the remaining 50% going towards business growth, product development, infrastructure development, and ecosystem reinvestment. Alon stated that this move aims to strengthen community trust and ensure long-term business growth.
